doc_class_description: A Court of Appeal judgment is a higher court ruling that reviews decisions of lower courts, shaping legal precedent and protecting citizens’ rights.

latest_doc_d.keywords: The petitioner resigned from his post 3 years before the application. The petitioner sought to treat the period of his absence from service as no-pay leave and to be reinstated.
